MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL for failure to file proof of service of order granting motion to withdraw is ordered off calendar. Proof of service was filed. Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion For Issue Sanction Or In The Alternative Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motio And Omtion For Issue Of Sanctions Or In The Alt/Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order;
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion for issue or terminating sanctions is ordered off calendar as the proof of service does not indicate the method of service. The Court cannot determine whether the motion was filed and served in a timely manner. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-17-2007 Continued To May-01-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Req. For Statement Of Damages, Req. For Production Of Documents, Form Special Int., Set One To Compel Deposition Of Plntf And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel responses to request for statement of damages, request for production of documents, form and special interrogatories and attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is ordered to contact counsel for defendant to schedule the deposition. The deposition shall be completed within 45 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $658 are to be paid within 45 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
